title: [CI:DOCS] [v4.2] pkginstaller: use correct GOARCH value in case of arm build
body:

comments.body: Interesting, this change shouldn't be growing the podman binary at all, since it's only changing a .sh script for building pkgs. Any idea what's going on? @containers/podman-maintainers
